title: Data Sources
subtitle: Where does the data come from?

items.name: IMF PortWatch
items.detail: Daily chokepoint transit counts via ArcGIS REST API. Satellite AIS-based. Updated once per day.

items.name: MarineTraffic (map)
items.detail: Live AIS vessel map embedded via iframe. Real-time vessel positions.

items.name: EIA (U.S. Energy Information Administration)
items.detail: Daily WTI, Brent, and Henry Hub Natural Gas prices. Free, unlimited API.

items.name: TradingView
items.detail: Real-time price charts embedded via widget (TVC:USOIL, TVC:UKOIL, CAPITALCOM:NATURALGAS).

items.name: Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
items.detail: Daily closing prices and change % for VIX (^VIX), Nasdaq (^IXIC), S&P 500 (^GSPC), KOSPI (^KS11), KOSDAQ (^KQ11).

items.name: Al Jazeera RSS
items.detail: Middle East headlines, auto-classified by keyword.

items.name: BBC Middle East RSS
items.detail: Middle East headlines from BBC News.

items.name: Anadolu Agency RSS
items.detail: Regional news from Turkey's state news agency.

disclaimer: All data is sourced from publicly available APIs and feeds. Hormuz Monitor is not affiliated with any of the data providers listed above.
